# Sync status

**Generated by `/sync-check`.** Do not edit by hand.

This file is empty until `/sync-check` is run. It will populate with:

- Per sub-repo: current default-branch HEAD, open PRs, recent activity
- Per active migration: per-repo state vs. what the migration says
- Drift flags: stale migrations, branches diverging from main, sub-repo
  changes that aren't tracked by any migration

To regenerate: run `/sync-check`.
